question: How has my performance been?
sql:
WITH quota AS (
  Select
    r.TERR_ID,
    r.REP_NAME,
    c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC AS Close_Qtr,
    o.BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
    SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL) AS Quota
  from vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA q
  join vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r   on q.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
  join vw_EBI_CALDATE c         on q.Quota_Fiscal_Quarter_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  join vw_EBI_OPG o             on q.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
  join vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc on q.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
  where q.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
    and r.TERR_ID not like '%_%Dummy%'
    and r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
    and rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX'
    and r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
    and (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
    and r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
    and o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING'
    and o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
  group by
    r.TERR_ID,
    r.REP_NAME,
    c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC,
    o.BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
),

pipe AS (
  Select
    r.TERR_ID,
    r.REP_NAME,
    c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC AS Close_Qtr,
    o.BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
    SUM(p.Oppty) AS Pipe
  from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
  join vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r   on p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
  join vw_ebi_sales_stage s     on p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
  join vw_EBI_CALDATE c         on p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  join vw_EBI_OPG o             on p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
  join vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc on p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
  where s.SALES_STAGE in ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3')
    and p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0)
    and p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
    and r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
    and rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX'
    and r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
    and (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
    and r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
    and o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING'
    and o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
  group by
    r.TERR_ID,
    r.REP_NAME,
    c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC,
    o.BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
),

base AS (
  select
    coalesce(q.TERR_ID, p.TERR_ID) as TERR_ID,
    coalesce(q.REP_NAME, p.REP_NAME) as REP_NAME,
    coalesce(q.Close_Qtr, p.Close_Qtr) as Close_Qtr,
    coalesce(q.BU, p.BU) as BU,
    coalesce(q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU, p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU) as ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    coalesce(q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP, p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP) as ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
    q.Quota,
    p.Pipe,
    case
      when q.Quota is null or q.Quota = 0 then null
      else cast(p.Pipe as numeric) / cast(q.Quota as numeric)
    end as Coverage_Ratio
  from quota q
  full outer join pipe p
    on q.TERR_ID = p.TERR_ID
    and q.REP_NAME = p.REP_NAME
    and q.Close_Qtr = p.Close_Qtr
    and q.BU = p.BU
    and q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU = p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU
    and q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
)

select
  TERR_ID,
  REP_NAME,
  Close_Qtr,
  BU,
  ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
  ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
  Quota,
  Pipe,
  round(Coverage_Ratio, 4) as Coverage_Ratio,
  case
    when Coverage_Ratio is null then null
    when Coverage_Ratio >= 2.5 then 'Green'
    when Coverage_Ratio >= 2.0 then 'Yellow'
    else 'Red'
  end as Coverage_Quality
from base
order by Close_Qtr, TERR_ID;
variants: What does my performance look like?
What does my pipeline coverage look like?

question: What is my pipeline?
sql:
Select R.REP_NAME,c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC Close_Qtr,ct.CREATOR,o.BU,RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,sum(Oppty) Pipe
from vw_TF_EBI_P2S P
join vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r on p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
join vw_ebi_sales_stage s on p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
join vw_EBI_CALDATE c on p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
join vw_EBI_OPG O on  p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
join vw_EBI_CREATOR_TYPE Ct on p.CREATOR_TYPE_ID = ct.ID
join vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage RC on p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
where s.SALES_STAGE in ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3') and p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0) and p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 and r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE' and RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX' and r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW') and (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL) and r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST') and o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING' and o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
group by R.REP_NAME,c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC,o.BU,ct.CREATOR,RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP

question: What is S3 or S4 pipeline?
sql:
Select R.REP_NAME,s.SALES_STAGE,c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC Close_Qtr,o.BU,RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,sum(Oppty) Oppty
from vw_TF_EBI_P2S P
join vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r on p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
join vw_ebi_sales_stage s on p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
join vw_EBI_CALDATE c on p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
join vw_EBI_OPG O on  p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
join vw_EBI_CREATOR_TYPE Ct on p.CREATOR_TYPE_ID = ct.ID
join vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage RC on p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
where s.SALES_STAGE in ('S3','S4') and p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0) and p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 and r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE' and RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX' and r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW') and (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL) and r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST') and o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING' and o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
group by R.REP_NAME,s.SALES_STAGE,c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC,o.BU,RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
order by 3
notes: For current quarter (CQ), apply an additional filter on close quarter (e.g. c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 or c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC = current quarter).

question: Are we creating enough pipeline?
sql:
WITH Pipe_Data AS (
    SELECT 
        r.TERR_ID,
        R.REP_NAME,
        o.BU,
        RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
        RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
        SUM(Oppty) AS GrossCreationPipe
    FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S P
    JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r 
        ON p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
    JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s 
        ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
    JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE cc 
        ON p.OPP_CREATE_DATE_ID = cc.DATE_KEY
    JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c 
        ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
    JOIN vw_EBI_OPG O  
        ON p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
    JOIN vw_EBI_CREATOR_TYPE Ct 
        ON p.CREATOR_TYPE_ID = ct.ID
    JOIN vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage RC 
        ON p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
    WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3')
        AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (
            SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID)
            FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2
            JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY
            WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0
        )
        AND cc.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
        AND c.QTR_BKT_IND IN (0,1,2,3,4)
        AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
        AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
        AND RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX'
        AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
        AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
        AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
        AND o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING'
        AND o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
    GROUP BY 
        r.TERR_ID,
        R.REP_NAME,
        o.BU,
        RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
        RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
),

Target_Data AS (
    SELECT 
        r.TERR_ID,
        R.REP_NAME,
        o.BU,
        RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
        RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 THEN Q.IN_QTR_GC_TARGET
                WHEN c.QTR_BKT_IND = 1 THEN Q.PIPE_TARGET_SURVIVAL_RATE * 0.4
                WHEN c.QTR_BKT_IND = 2 THEN Q.PIPE_TARGET_SURVIVAL_RATE * 0.4
                WHEN c.QTR_BKT_IND = 3 THEN Q.PIPE_TARGET_SURVIVAL_RATE * 0.14
                WHEN c.QTR_BKT_IND = 4 THEN Q.PIPE_TARGET_SURVIVAL_RATE * 0.05
            END
        ) AS GrossCreationTarget
    FROM vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA Q
    JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r 
        ON Q.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
    JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c 
        ON Q.Quota_Fiscal_Quarter_ID = c.DATE_KEY
    JOIN vw_EBI_OPG O  
        ON Q.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
    JOIN vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage RC 
        ON Q.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
    WHERE PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
        AND r.TERR_ID NOT LIKE '%_%Dummy%'
        AND c.QTR_BKT_IND IN (0,1,2,3,4)
        AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
        AND RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX'
        AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
        AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
        AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
        AND o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING'
        AND o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
    GROUP BY 
        r.TERR_ID,
        R.REP_NAME,
        o.BU,
        RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
        RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
)

SELECT 
    p.TERR_ID,
    p.REP_NAME,
    p.BU,
    p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
    p.GrossCreationPipe,
    t.GrossCreationTarget,
    
    ROUND(
        CASE 
            WHEN t.GrossCreationTarget = 0 THEN NULL
            ELSE p.GrossCreationPipe / t.GrossCreationTarget
        END
    , 2) AS Creation_Coverage,
    
    CASE 
        WHEN t.GrossCreationTarget = 0 THEN 'NA'
        WHEN p.GrossCreationPipe / t.GrossCreationTarget >= 2.5 THEN 'Green'
        WHEN p.GrossCreationPipe / t.GrossCreationTarget >= 2.0 THEN 'Yellow'
        ELSE 'Red'
    END AS Creation_Coverage_Quality

FROM Pipe_Data p
LEFT JOIN Target_Data t
    ON  p.TERR_ID = t.TERR_ID
    AND p.BU = t.BU
    AND p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU = t.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU
    AND p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = t.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP

ORDER BY p.TERR_ID;
variants: Do we have enough pipeline being created?
Am I hitting the pipeline targets?
Are my reps creating enough pipeline?

question: What is the gap?
sql:
WITH quota AS (
  Select
    r.TERR_ID,
    r.REP_NAME,
    c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC AS Close_Qtr,
    o.BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
    SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL) AS Quota
  from vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA q
  join vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r   on q.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
  join vw_EBI_CALDATE c         on q.Quota_Fiscal_Quarter_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  join vw_EBI_OPG o             on q.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
  join vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc on q.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
  where q.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
    and r.TERR_ID not like '%_%Dummy%'
    and r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
    and rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX'
    and r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
    and (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
    and r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
    and o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING'
    and o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
  group by
    r.TERR_ID,
    r.REP_NAME,
    c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC,
    o.BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
),

pipe AS (
  Select
    r.TERR_ID,
    r.REP_NAME,
    c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC AS Close_Qtr,
    o.BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
    SUM(p.Oppty) AS Pipe
  from vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
  join vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r   on p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
  join vw_ebi_sales_stage s     on p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
  join vw_EBI_CALDATE c         on p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  join vw_EBI_OPG o             on p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
  join vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc on p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
  where s.SALES_STAGE in ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3')
    and p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0)
    and p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
    and r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
    and rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX'
    and r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
    and (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
    and r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
    and o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING'
    and o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
  group by
    r.TERR_ID,
    r.REP_NAME,
    c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC,
    o.BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
),

base AS (
  select
    coalesce(q.TERR_ID, p.TERR_ID) as TERR_ID,
    coalesce(q.REP_NAME, p.REP_NAME) as REP_NAME,
    coalesce(q.Close_Qtr, p.Close_Qtr) as Close_Qtr,
    coalesce(q.BU, p.BU) as BU,
    coalesce(q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU, p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU) as ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
    coalesce(q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP, p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP) as ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
    q.Quota,
    p.Pipe
  from quota q
  full outer join pipe p
    on q.TERR_ID = p.TERR_ID
    and q.REP_NAME = p.REP_NAME
    and q.Close_Qtr = p.Close_Qtr
    and q.BU = p.BU
    and q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU = p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU
    and q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
)

select
  TERR_ID,
  REP_NAME,
  Close_Qtr,
  BU,
  ROLE_COVERAGE_BU,
  ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP,
  Quota,
  Pipe,
  coalesce(Quota,0) - coalesce(Pipe,0) as Gap
from base
order by Close_Qtr, TERR_ID;
variants: How much gap do I have?

question: Show net pipeline by creator
sql:
Select ct.CREATOR, sum(Oppty) Pipe
from vw_TF_EBI_P2S P
join vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r on p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
join vw_ebi_sales_stage s on p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
join vw_EBI_CALDATE c on p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
join vw_EBI_OPG O on p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
join vw_EBI_CREATOR_TYPE Ct on p.CREATOR_TYPE_ID = ct.ID
join vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage RC on p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
where s.SALES_STAGE in ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3') and p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0 AND p2.REGION_ID IN (SELECT rls_r.REGION_ID FROM vw_td_ebi_region_rpt rls_r WHERE rls_r.FLM_ID = 310978))
  AND P.REGION_ID IN (SELECT rls_r.REGION_ID FROM vw_td_ebi_region_rpt rls_r WHERE rls_r.FLM_ID = 310978)
  and p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 and r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE' and RC.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX' and r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW') and (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL) and r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST') and o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING' and o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
group by ct.CREATOR

question: What is pipeline by stage mix?
sql:
SELECT s.SALES_STAGE,
  r.GLOBAL_REGION,
  o.BU,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.OPP_ID) AS Deal_Count,
  SUM(p.Oppty) AS Pipe
FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
JOIN vw_EBI_OPG o ON p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
JOIN vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc ON p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3')
  AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0)
  AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
  AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
  AND rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX'
  AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
  AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
  AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
  AND o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING'
  AND o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
GROUP BY s.SALES_STAGE, r.GLOBAL_REGION, o.BU
ORDER BY s.SALES_STAGE, r.GLOBAL_REGION, o.BU
variants: Pipeline by SS1 SS2 SS3 SS4 SS5

question: What is pipeline by source?
sql:
SELECT ct.CREATOR,
  r.GLOBAL_REGION,
  c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC AS Close_Qtr,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.OPP_ID) AS Deal_Count,
  SUM(p.Oppty) AS Pipe
FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
JOIN vw_EBI_OPG o ON p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
JOIN vw_EBI_CREATOR_TYPE ct ON p.CREATOR_TYPE_ID = ct.ID
JOIN vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc ON p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3')
  AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0)
  AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
  AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
  AND rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX'
  AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
  AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
  AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
  AND o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING'
  AND o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
GROUP BY ct.CREATOR, r.GLOBAL_REGION, c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC
ORDER BY ct.CREATOR, r.GLOBAL_REGION
variants: Show pipeline by Sales BDR Partner

question: Pipeline walk for this quarter
sql:
SELECT w.WALK_CATEGORY,
  SUM(w.GROSSASV) AS Walk_Amount
FROM vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK w
JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON w.REGION_ID = r.Region_Id
JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON w.CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
WHERE c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
  AND w.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(w2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK w2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON w2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0)
  AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
  AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
  AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
  AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
GROUP BY w.WALK_CATEGORY
ORDER BY w.WALK_CATEGORY

question: Pipeline walk by region
sql:
SELECT r.GLOBAL_REGION,
  w.WALK_CATEGORY,
  SUM(w.GROSSASV) AS Walk_Amount
FROM vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK w
JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON w.REGION_ID = r.Region_Id
JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON w.CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
WHERE c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
  AND w.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(w2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_PIPE_WALK w2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON w2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0)
  AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
  AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
  AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
  AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
GROUP BY r.GLOBAL_REGION, w.WALK_CATEGORY
ORDER BY r.GLOBAL_REGION, w.WALK_CATEGORY

question: Top deals pushed multiple times
sql:
SELECT TOP 20
  opp.OPP_NAME,
  r.REP_NAME,
  r.FLM_NAME,
  r.GLOBAL_REGION,
  s.SALES_STAGE,
  opp.PUSHED_COUNT,
  p.Oppty AS ARR
FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
JOIN vw_TD_EBI_OPP opp ON p.OPP_ID = opp.OPP_ID
JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3')
  AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0)
  AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
  AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
  AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
  AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
  AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
  AND opp.PUSHED_COUNT >= 2
  AND c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
ORDER BY p.Oppty DESC

question: Which deals to focus on by Deal Sensei score?
sql:
SELECT TOP 30
  opp.OPP_NAME,
  r.REP_NAME,
  r.FLM_NAME,
  s.SALES_STAGE,
  r.GLOBAL_REGION,
  p.Oppty AS ARR,
  opp.DS_SCORE,
  CASE
    WHEN opp.DS_SCORE >= 65 THEN 'High Priority'
    WHEN opp.DS_SCORE >= 40 THEN 'Review'
    ELSE 'At Risk'
  END AS DS_Priority
FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
JOIN vw_TD_EBI_OPP opp ON p.OPP_ID = opp.OPP_ID
JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3')
  AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0)
  AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
  AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
  AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
  AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
  AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
  AND c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0
  AND opp.DS_SCORE IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.Oppty DESC, opp.DS_SCORE DESC

Show deals ranked by Deal Sensei score

question: What is my GNARR?
sql:
WITH quota AS (
  SELECT r.TERR_ID, r.REP_NAME, c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC AS Close_Qtr, o.BU, rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU, rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP, SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL) AS Quota
  FROM vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA q
  JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON q.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
  JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON q.Quota_Fiscal_Quarter_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  JOIN vw_EBI_OPG o ON q.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
  JOIN vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc ON q.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
  WHERE q.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 AND r.TERR_ID NOT LIKE '%_%Dummy%' AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE' AND rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX' AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW') AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL) AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST') AND o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING' AND o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
  GROUP BY r.TERR_ID, r.REP_NAME, c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC, o.BU, rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU, rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
),
pipe AS (
  SELECT r.TERR_ID, r.REP_NAME, c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC AS Close_Qtr, o.BU, rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU, rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP, SUM(p.Oppty) AS GNARR_Dollar
  FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
  JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
  JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
  JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  JOIN vw_EBI_OPG o ON p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
  JOIN vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc ON p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
  WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3') AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0) AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE' AND rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX' AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW') AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL) AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST') AND o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING' AND o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
  GROUP BY r.TERR_ID, r.REP_NAME, c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC, o.BU, rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU, rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
),
base AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(q.TERR_ID, p.TERR_ID) AS TERR_ID, COALESCE(q.REP_NAME, p.REP_NAME) AS REP_NAME, COALESCE(q.Close_Qtr, p.Close_Qtr) AS Close_Qtr, COALESCE(q.BU, p.BU) AS BU, COALESCE(q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU, p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU) AS ROLE_COVERAGE_BU, COALESCE(q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP, p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP) AS ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP, q.Quota, p.GNARR_Dollar, CASE WHEN q.Quota IS NULL OR q.Quota = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(CAST(p.GNARR_Dollar AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / NULLIF(q.Quota, 0), 2) END AS GNARR_Pct
  FROM quota q
  FULL OUTER JOIN pipe p ON q.TERR_ID = p.TERR_ID AND q.REP_NAME = p.REP_NAME AND q.Close_Qtr = p.Close_Qtr AND q.BU = p.BU AND q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU = p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU AND q.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = p.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP
)
SELECT TERR_ID, REP_NAME, Close_Qtr, BU, ROLE_COVERAGE_BU, ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP, Quota, GNARR_Dollar, GNARR_Pct FROM base ORDER BY Close_Qtr, TERR_ID
variants: What is my gross new ARR?

question: Show participation rate
sql:
WITH quota AS (
  SELECT r.TERR_ID, r.REP_NAME, SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL) AS Quota
  FROM vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA q
  JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON q.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
  JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON q.Quota_Fiscal_Quarter_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  JOIN vw_EBI_OPG o ON q.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
  JOIN vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc ON q.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
  WHERE q.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 AND r.TERR_ID NOT LIKE '%_%Dummy%' AND c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE' AND rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX' AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW') AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL) AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST') AND o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING' AND o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
  GROUP BY r.TERR_ID, r.REP_NAME
),
pipe AS (
  SELECT r.TERR_ID, r.REP_NAME, SUM(p.Oppty) AS Pipe
  FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
  JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
  JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
  JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  JOIN vw_EBI_OPG o ON p.OPG_ID = o.OPG_KEY
  JOIN vw_TD_EBI_ROLE_Coverage rc ON p.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID = rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_ID
  WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3') AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0) AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 AND c.QTR_BKT_IND = 0 AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE' AND rc.ROLE_COVERAGE_BU_GROUP = 'DMX' AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW') AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL) AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST') AND o.MOPG1 <> 'ADVERTISING' AND o.DMX_SOLUTION_GROUP <> 'PPBU'
  GROUP BY r.TERR_ID, r.REP_NAME
),
rep_attainment AS (
  SELECT q.TERR_ID, q.REP_NAME, CASE WHEN q.Quota IS NULL OR q.Quota = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST(COALESCE(p.Pipe, 0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(q.Quota, 0) END AS Attainment_Pct
  FROM quota q
  LEFT JOIN pipe p ON q.TERR_ID = p.TERR_ID AND q.REP_NAME = p.REP_NAME
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total_Reps, SUM(CASE WHEN Attainment_Pct >= 0.75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Reps_At_75, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Attainment_Pct >= 0.75 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS Participation_Pct FROM rep_attainment

question: What is the stalled pipeline?
sql:
WITH pipe AS (
  SELECT p.OPP_ID, p.Oppty, p.Region_Id, p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID, opp.DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED AS DSNSM, opp.STAGE_DURATION AS SD
  FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
  JOIN vw_TD_EBI_OPP opp ON p.OPP_ID = opp.OPP_ID
  JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
  JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3') AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0) AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 AND c.QTR_BKT_IND IN (0,1)
),
stalled AS (
  SELECT OPP_ID, Oppty, CASE WHEN (DSNSM > 30 OR (SD > 90 AND DSNSM > 15)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Is_Stalled FROM pipe
)
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Is_Stalled = 1 THEN Oppty ELSE 0 END) AS Stalled_Pipe, SUM(Oppty) AS Total_Pipe, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Is_Stalled = 1 THEN Oppty ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(Oppty), 0), 2) AS Stalled_Pct FROM stalled
variants: What percent of pipeline is stalled?

question: Show stalled deals
sql:
SELECT opp.OPP_NAME,
  r.REP_NAME,
  r.FLM_NAME,
  r.GLOBAL_REGION,
  s.SALES_STAGE,
  p.Oppty AS ARR,
  opp.DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED AS DSNSM,
  opp.STAGE_DURATION AS SD
FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
JOIN vw_TD_EBI_OPP opp ON p.OPP_ID = opp.OPP_ID
JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON p.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S7','S6','S5','S4','S3')
  AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0)
  AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
  AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
  AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
  AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
  AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
  AND c.QTR_BKT_IND IN (0,1)
  AND (opp.DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED > 30 OR (opp.STAGE_DURATION > 90 AND opp.DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED > 15))
ORDER BY p.Oppty DESC
variants: Deals with no recent next steps

question: Top S4 deals for progression
sql:
SELECT TOP 5
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY opp.DS_SCORE DESC, p.Oppty DESC) AS Progression_Rank,
  opp.OPP_NAME,
  r.REP_NAME,
  r.GLOBAL_REGION,
  s.SALES_STAGE,
  c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC AS Close_Qtr,
  p.Oppty AS Pipeline_Amount,
  opp.DS_SCORE,
  opp.DS_EXPLANATION,
  opp.DS_NEXT_BEST_ACTIONS,
  opp.MUTUAL_PLAN_STATUS,
  opp.AUTHORITY,
  opp.BUDGET,
  opp.TECHNICAL_FIT,
  opp.TIMING,
  opp.SUCCESS,
  opp.NEXT_STEP,
  opp.DAYS_SINCE_NEXT_STEPS_MODIFIED
FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
JOIN vw_TD_EBI_OPP opp ON p.OPP_ID = opp.OPP_ID
JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON p.REGION_ID = r.REGION_ID
JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
WHERE s.SALES_STAGE = 'S4'
  AND c.FISCAL_YR_AND_QTR_DESC = '2026-Q2'
  AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0 AND p2.REGION_ID IN (SELECT rls_r.REGION_ID FROM vw_td_ebi_region_rpt rls_r WHERE rls_r.FLM_ID = 310978))
  AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0
  AND p.REGION_ID IN (SELECT rls_r.REGION_ID FROM vw_td_ebi_region_rpt rls_r WHERE rls_r.FLM_ID = 310978)
  AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE'
  AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW')
  AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL)
  AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
ORDER BY opp.DS_SCORE DESC, p.Oppty DESC
variants: Which S4 deals to focus on for progression?
Top S4 deals by DS score

question: S5+ coverage for next quarter
sql:
WITH s5_pipe AS (
  SELECT SUM(p.Oppty) AS S5_Pipe
  FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p
  JOIN vw_ebi_sales_stage s ON p.SALES_STAGE_ID = s.SALES_STAGE_ID
  JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON p.OPP_CLOSE_DATE_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  WHERE s.SALES_STAGE IN ('S6','S7') AND p.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = (SELECT MAX(p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID) FROM vw_TF_EBI_P2S p2 JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c2 ON p2.SNAPSHOT_DATE_ID = c2.DATE_KEY WHERE c2.WEEK_SORT_ORDER_REVERSE = 0) AND p.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 AND c.QTR_BKT_IND = 1
),
quota_q1 AS (
  SELECT SUM(q.QUOTA_ACTUAL) AS Quota
  FROM vw_TF_EBI_QUOTA q
  JOIN vw_td_ebi_region_rpt r ON q.Region_Id = r.Region_Id
  JOIN vw_EBI_CALDATE c ON q.Quota_Fiscal_Quarter_ID = c.DATE_KEY
  WHERE q.PAY_MEASURE_ID = 0 AND r.TERR_ID NOT LIKE '%_%Dummy%' AND c.QTR_BKT_IND = 1 AND r.ROLE_TYPE_DISPLAY = 'AE' AND r.SALES_TEAM_BU IN ('#NA','DX','DX/DME','WW') AND (r.SALES_REGION NOT LIKE '%DME%' OR r.SALES_REGION IS NULL) AND r.SALES_TEAM NOT IN ('AMER IND PS DX','AMER LATAM PS','AMER ENT PS DX','AMER PUB SEC SPECIALIST')
)
SELECT s.S5_Pipe, t.Quota, ROUND(CAST(s.S5_Pipe AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(t.Quota, 0), 4) AS S5_Covx FROM s5_pipe s CROSS JOIN quota_q1 t
variants: Mature pipe coverage for next quarter
